task_completion.description: Verify that the required Chrome flags for optimization are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the chrome://flags page showing 'Smooth Scrolling', 'Parallel downloading', and 'Back-forward cache' searched and set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the font size settings are increased for outdoor readability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Appearance > Customize fonts showing the 'Font size' slider/value set to 20 and 'Minimum font size' set to 14.

task_completion.description: Verify the browser homepage or startup page is set to the correct SCADA domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > On startup or Appearance showing the homepage/startup page explicitly set to 'vestas.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default download directory is set to the specified field reports folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Downloads showing the 'Location' path ending in 'Field_Reports'.

task_completion.description: Verify that specific notification and geolocation permissions are allowed for the required SCADA and weather domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site settings (or specific permission pages for Location/Notifications) showing 'vestas.com', 'bazefield.com', 'scada-international.com', 'windy.com', 'weather.gov', and 'maps.google.com' in the 'Allowed' lists.

task_completion.description: Verify that the operational bookmark folders are created and organized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmarks Bar or Bookmark Manager showing exactly these folders: 'Monitoring & SCADA', 'Parts & Documentation', 'Weather & Navigation', and 'Personal'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser window with settings pages open, rather than a terminal window editing the 'Preferences' JSON file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent opened the configuration standard document to read the requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot should show the file '~/Desktop/remote_terminal_config_standard.txt' open in a text editor or terminal (e.g., using cat, less, or gedit).

integrity.description: Ensure the settings pages are genuine Chrome interfaces and not mocked HTML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar should show 'chrome://settings/...' or 'chrome://flags' and the UI should match standard Chrome styling without signs of Inspect Element manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The VLM must verify the following exact values from the configuration standard: 1. Chrome Flags to enable: 'smooth-scrolling', 'enable-parallel-downloading', 'back-forward-cache'. 2. Font settings: Font size = 20, Minimum font size = 14. 3. Homepage domain: 'vestas.com'. 4. Download directory: 'Field_Reports'. 5. SCADA domains requiring permissions: 'vestas.com', 'bazefield.com', 'scada-international.com'. 6. Weather domains requiring permissions: 'windy.com', 'weather.gov', 'maps.google.com'. 7. Bookmark folders: 'Monitoring & SCADA', 'Parts & Documentation', 'Weather & Navigation', 'Personal'.
